body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-49017", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 7.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:L"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-835", "name": "Loop with Unreachable Exit Condition ('Infinite Loop')"}], "description": "In OpenStack Swift before 2.36.2 and 2.37.2, s3api middleware enters an infinite loop when processing a truncated aws-chunked PUT request body. The StreamingInput class repeatedly appends an empty buffer and re-reads, causing the proxy-server worker handling the request to become permanently unresponsive with increasing CPU and memory consumption. An authenticated attacker can systematically exhaust all proxy-server workers, resulting in denial of service. The defect was introduced in Swift 2.36.0.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00322, "percentile": 0.2376}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-g7jq-j257-rww2", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-01T18:04:11Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g7jq-j257-rww2", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-g7jq-j257-rww2"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49017"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-27T02:16:34Z", "published_at": "2026-05-27T03:30:31Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-49017", "https://bugs.launchpad.net/bugs/2152205", "https://review.opendev.org/c/openstack/swift/+/987957", "https://review.opendev.org/c/openstack/swift/+/988093", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/05/27/9", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/06/02/6", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g7jq-j257-rww2"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openstack/swift", "summary": "OpenStack Swift: s3api middleware enters an infinite loop when processing a truncated aws-chunked PUT request body", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-01T18:04:12Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-g7jq-j257-rww2", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "swift"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.36.0, <= 2.36.1"}, {"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "swift"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.37.0, <= 2.37.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
